chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1151 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.8530/25. 20.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Sachal R.Awan, Advocate for Applicant / Surety. ***************************************** Through this Misc Application, applicant Mushaif Ali Mir seeks return of surety papers submitted by him while he stood surety for accused Bashir Ahmed Chandio who was granted Protective Bail by this court vide order dated 22.09.2025. Learned counsel submits that after grant of protective bail by this Court, accused surrendered before the trial Court within the stipulated period for grant of interim pre-arrest bail, hence the surety documents are no more required by this Court. Learned A.P.G. raised no objection to the return of surety papers. Accordingly, the listed Application is granted. Office is directed to return the surety papers to the applicant / surety on proper verification and identification. JUDGE Ali.
